scope: G2 import and regression harness preservation

checks.evidence: No weights imported; G1 evidence remains anchored to prior real-pretrained-weight RunPod/phone gate.

checks.name: comparator_tolerance_relaxation
checks.evidence: Threshold remains p50 >= 0.99 in PRD, GPD requirements, runbook, manifest, and G1 result.

checks.name: forbidden_artifact_leakage
checks.evidence: Integration namespace leak scans found zero forbidden files and zero forbidden directories after generated pycache removal.

checks.name: hidden_host_runtime_path
checks.evidence: G2 imports and builds harness only; no training runtime claim is promoted.

checks.name: g1_regression
checks.evidence: Prior authority G1 result is preserved, and after the device was reconnected live phone replay produced the same sha256 cef523f674cff7ecd01cb59040048f9188f80bcb58b9fc47f1fa7f370ce332cf.

checks.name: narrative_pass_without_artifact_pass
